SPACEMERCS-UNKNOWN_TARGET_ENEMY.title: Unknown
SPACEMERCS-UNKNOWN_TARGET_SELF.title: Unknown
SPACEMERCS-UNKNOWN_TARGET_ALLY.title: Unknown
SPACEMERCS-STRIKE_COSMOPALADIN.title: Strike
SPACEMERCS-DEFEND_COSMOPALADIN.title: Defend
SPACEMERCS-THROWING_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
|}Gain {CurePower:diff()} [color=springgreen]Cure[/color].
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange].
Put this back in your hand.
Costs 1 more this turn.
SPACEMERCS-THROWING_HAMMER.title: Throwing Hammer
SPACEMERCS-HAMMER_STRIKE.title: Hammer Strike
SPACEMERCS-SMOKE_SCREEN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Reduce the cost of a random card in your hand by 1 until played.
SPACEMERCS-SMOKE_SCREEN.title: Smoke Screen
SPACEMERCS-TACTICAL_STRAFE.title: Tactical Strafe
SPACEMERCS-JETPACK.title: Jetpack
SPACEMERCS-REMEMBERED_VOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Increase {IfUpgraded:show:both|one randomly} by 1 permanently.
Costs 1 less is [gold]Broken Oath[/gold] is not in your deck.
SPACEMERCS-REMEMBERED_VOW.title: Remembered Vow
SPACEMERCS-BROKEN_OATH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Costs 1 less if [gold]Remembered Vow[/gold] is not in your deck.
SPACEMERCS-BROKEN_OATH.title: Broken Oath
SPACEMERCS-INCENDIARY_GRENADE.title: Incendiary Grenade
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_GRENADE.description: At the start of your turn, apply {ThermitePower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_GRENADE.title: Thermite Grenade
SPACEMERCS-FUSION_GRENADE.title: Fusion Grenade
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES.description: Whenever you play a card containing "Grenade" without [gold]Exhaust[/gold], add a 0 cost copy with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES.title: Ashes to Ashes
SPACEMERCS-SOLAR_RAMPART.description:
[gold]Unplayable[/gold] unless the previous card played was a skill.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {CurePower:diff()} [color=springgreen]Cure[/color].
SPACEMERCS-SOLAR_RAMPART.title: Solar Rampart
SPACEMERCS-FIERY_SPLENDOR.title: Fiery Splendor
SPACEMERCS-CAUTERIZE.description:
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange] X times.{IfUpgraded:show:
Gain {CurePower:diff} [color=springgreen]Cure[/color] X times.}
SPACEMERCS-CAUTERIZE.title: Cauterize
SPACEMERCS-BRING_THE_HEAT.description: Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {IfUpgraded:show:double }your [color=springgreen]Cure[/color].
SPACEMERCS-BRING_THE_HEAT.title: Bring the Heat
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_FISTS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [orange]Scorch[/orange] equal to your [color=springgreen]Cure[/color].
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_FISTS.title: Burning Fists
SPACEMERCS-PERCUSSIVE_FLAMES.description:
Whenever you apply [orange]Scorch[/orange], apply 1 more.
Add {Burns:diff()} [gold]Burn{IfUpgraded:show:|s}[/gold] to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-PERCUSSIVE_FLAMES.title: Percussive Flames
SPACEMERCS-CONSECRATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Heal hp equal to the unblocked damage.
SPACEMERCS-CONSECRATE.title: Consecrate
SPACEMERCS-FORGE_MASTER.description:
[color=orangered]Ignitions[/color] you cause apply 2 [orange]Scorch[/orange].
ALL [color=orangered]Ignitions[/color] deal 30 damage to all other enemies instead.
SPACEMERCS-FORGE_MASTER.title: Forge Master
SPACEMERCS-SUNFIRE_FURNACE.description:
Gain {CurePower:diff()} [color=springgreen]Cure[/color].
You cannot lose [color=springgreen]Cure[/color] until your next turn.
SPACEMERCS-SUNFIRE_FURNACE.title: Sunfire Furnace
SPACEMERCS-PHOENIX_RISING.title: Phoenix Rising
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_TREADS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange].
Until end of turn, whenever anybody plays a card, apply {BurningTreadsPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange] to the enemy.
SPACEMERCS-BURNING_TREADS.title: Burning Treads
SPACEMERCS-FIREWALKER.title: Firewalker
SPACEMERCS-TEST_WILL_GAIN.title: Test Will Gain
SPACEMERCS-FROSTBURN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange].
Apply {SlowedPower:diff()} [color=cyan]Slowed[/color].
Gain {FrostArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Frost Armor[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-FROSTBURN.title: Frostburn
SPACEMERCS-HUNGERING_FLAME.description:
Equalize your [gold]Hunger[/gold] and [color=SpringGreen]Cure[/color].
End your turn.
SPACEMERCS-HUNGERING_FLAME.title: Hungering Flame
SPACEMERCS-GNAW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} you have.
SPACEMERCS-GNAW.title: Gnaw
SPACEMERCS-STARVING_GRENADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {HungerPower:diff()} [gold]Hunger[/gold].
Take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage for each {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} you have.
SPACEMERCS-STARVING_GRENADE.title: Starving Grenade
SPACEMERCS-VOIDWALL_GRENADE.description: Whenever an enemy hits your [gold]Block[/gold], apply {VoidwallPower:diff()} [gold]Suppress[/gold] to them.
SPACEMERCS-VOIDWALL_GRENADE.title: Voidwall Grenade
SPACEMERCS-SUPPRESSION_GRENADE.title: Suppression Grenade
SPACEMERCS-PURGING_MAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to EVERYONE.
Gain {HungerPower:diff()} [gold]Hunger[/gold] for each hit.
SPACEMERCS-PURGING_MAW.title: Purging Maw
SPACEMERCS-ORBITAL_SHIELD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Multihit:diff()} times.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the unblocked damage.
SPACEMERCS-ORBITAL_SHIELD.title: Orbital Shield
SPACEMERCS-DREADED_VISAGE.description: Apply {SuppressPower:diff()} [gold]Suppress[/gold] to ALL enemies for each [gold]Void[/gold] in your draw pile, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL of them.
SPACEMERCS-DREADED_VISAGE.title: Dreaded Visage
SPACEMERCS-UNWAVERING_STAR_BASE.descript:
Does nothing until you've chosen a path.{IfUpgraded:show:
(Remove either [gold]Remembered Vow[/gold] or [gold]Broken Oath[/gold] from your deck.)}
SPACEMERCS-UNWAVERING_STAR_BASE.title: Unwavering Star
SPACEMERCS-UNWAVERING_STAR_VOW.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {HungerPower:diff()} [gold]Hunger[/gold].
Increase {IfUpgraded:show:both|one randomly} by 1 permanently.
SPACEMERCS-UNWAVERING_STAR_VOW.title: Unwavering Star
SPACEMERCS-UNWAVERING_STAR_OATH.title: Unwavering Star
SPACEMERCS-ANSWER_THE_CALL.title: Answer the Call
SPACEMERCS-VENGEANCE.title: Vengeance
SPACEMERCS-DESOLATE_WILL.description: Whenever you draw an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card, draw a card.
SPACEMERCS-DESOLATE_WILL.title: Desolate Will
SPACEMERCS-DOOM_FALL.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for every [gold]Void[/gold] in your draw pile, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL of them.
SPACEMERCS-DOOM_FALL.title: Doom Fall
SPACEMERCS-EMPTY_EMBRACE.description:
[gold]Voids[/gold] lose [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], deal {EmptyEmbracePower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-EMPTY_EMBRACE.title: Empty Embrace
SPACEMERCS-DARK_GIFT.description:
Gain a random{IfUpgraded:show:| common} relic.
Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
SPACEMERCS-DARK_GIFT.title: Dark Gift
SPACEMERCS-SATIATION.title: Satiation
SPACEMERCS-STARVATION.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Hunger[/gold] at the start of your turn.
Increase this amount by {StarvationPower:diff()}.
Deal damage equal to unspent {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the end of your turn.
SPACEMERCS-STARVATION.title: Starvation
SPACEMERCS-COLD_DARK_GENTLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {HungerPower:diff()} [gold]Hunger[/gold].
This costs 0 if an enemy is [jitter][color=blue]Frozen[/color][/jitter].
SPACEMERCS-COLD_DARK_GENTLE.title: Cold, Dark, Gentle
SPACEMERCS-ABYSSAL_FLARE.description:
Convert your [color=springgreen]Cure[/color] into [gold]Block[/gold] and gain that much [gold]Hunger[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange] to a random enemy.}
SPACEMERCS-ABYSSAL_FLARE.title: Abyssal Flare
SPACEMERCS-LEECHING_GRAB.description:
Remove ALL debuffs from an enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each stack removed.
SPACEMERCS-LEECHING_GRAB.title: Leeching Grab
SPACEMERCS-DIRE_PREDICAMENT.description:
Remove ALL your debuffs.
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Exhaust all cards in your {IfUpgraded:show:|hand and }discard pile.
SPACEMERCS-DIRE_PREDICAMENT.title: Dire Predicament
SPACEMERCS-KNOWLEDGE_SHOCK.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Void[/gold], gain {KnowledgeShockPower:diff()} [gold]Amp[/gold] and draw {KnowledgeShockPower:diff()} card{KnowledgeShockPower:plural(en):||s}.
SPACEMERCS-KNOWLEDGE_SHOCK.title: Knowledge Shock
SPACEMERCS-FLASH_GRENADE.title: Flash Grenade
SPACEMERCS-PULSE_GRENADE.description: At the start of your turn, apply {PulseGrenadePower:diff()} [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-PULSE_GRENADE.title: Pulse Grenade
SPACEMERCS-LIGHTNING_GRENADE.title: Lightning Grenade
SPACEMERCS-THUNDERCLAP.description: Double the [gold]Jolt[/gold] on an enemy, then deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
SPACEMERCS-THUNDERCLAP.title: Thunderclap
SPACEMERCS-SEISMIC_STRIKE.description:
Deal X damage twice.
Apply twice X [gold]Jolt[/gold].
Gain twice X [gold]Amp[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Draw X cards.}
[gold]Refund[/gold] up to {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
SPACEMERCS-SEISMIC_STRIKE.title: Seismic Strike
SPACEMERCS-STURDY_CIRCUITRY.description: Whenever you play a card that costs more than {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}, refund up to {SturdyCircuitryPower:diff()}{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
SPACEMERCS-STURDY_CIRCUITRY.title: Sturdy Circuitry
SPACEMERCS-POKE.description:
Deal damage equal to the enemy's [gold]Jolt[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural(en):|card|cards}.
SPACEMERCS-POKE.title: Poke
SPACEMERCS-PROD.title: Prod
SPACEMERCS-BOOST.title: Boost
SPACEMERCS-SEARING_VOLTAGE.description: Whenever an enemy gains [orange]Scorch[/orange], they gain {SearingVoltagePower:diff()} [gold]Jolt[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-SEARING_VOLTAGE.title: Searing Voltage
SPACEMERCS-BATTERY.description:
Remove ALL your [gold]Amp[/gold].
Regain {IfUpgraded:show:double|it} at the start of your next turn.
SPACEMERCS-BATTERY.title: Battery
SPACEMERCS-AMPLIFY_POTENTIAL.title: Amplify Potential
SPACEMERCS-NEGATIVE_FEEDBACK.description: Whenever you take unblocked damage while you have [gold]Amp[/gold], apply {NegativeFeedbackPower:diff()} [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-NEGATIVE_FEEDBACK.title: Negative Feedback
SPACEMERCS-POSITIVE_FEEDBACK.description: At the start of your turn, if you haven't taken unblocked damage since last turn, gain {PositiveFeedbackPower:diff()} [gold]Amp[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-POSITIVE_FEEDBACK.title: Positive Feedback
SPACEMERCS-CONSUMING_ENERGY.description: The next time more than 3 energy is spent at once this turn, refund up to 3 energy.
SPACEMERCS-CONSUMING_ENERGY.title: Consuming Energy
SPACEMERCS-RECRUDESCE.description: Whenever an [color=orangered]Ignition[/color] is triggered, apply {RecrudescePower:diff()} [orange]Scorch[/orange] and {RecrudescePower:diff()} [gold]Jolt[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-RECRUDESCE.title: Recrudesce
SPACEMERCS-FINAL_STAND.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Discard any number of cards then draw|Draw} cards until your hand is full.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}.
Gain 3 [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow].
Can only be played if you are under 25% HP.
SPACEMERCS-FINAL_STAND.selectionScreenPr: Choose any number of cards to replace.
SPACEMERCS-FINAL_STAND.title: Final Stand
SPACEMERCS-IMPEDE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card played this turn.{InCombat:
({CardsPlayed:diff()} {CardsPlayed:plural(en):cards have|card has|cards have} been played this turn)|}
SPACEMERCS-IMPEDE.title: Impede
SPACEMERCS-ALTERNATE.description: Discard a card, then deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {IfUpgraded:show:and draw cards }for each energy cost of the discarded card.
SPACEMERCS-ALTERNATE.title: Alternate
SPACEMERCS-OFF_AND_ON_AGAIN.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Discard {Cards:diff()} cards.
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain 2 [gold]Temporary Strength[/gold].
}Return this to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-OFF_AND_ON_AGAIN.title: Off And On Again
SPACEMERCS-GLACIER_GRENADE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have {BlockTarget:diff()} or more [gold]Block[/gold], apply {SlowedPower:diff()} [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-GLACIER_GRENADE.title: Glacier Grenade
SPACEMERCS-ICEFALL.title: Icefall
SPACEMERCS-GLACIAL_GUARD.title: Glacial Guard
SPACEMERCS-OUT_OF_OPTIONS.description:
[jitter][color=blue]Freeze[/color][/jitter] ALL enemies.
End your turn.
Can only be played as your first card this turn.
SPACEMERCS-OUT_OF_OPTIONS.title: Out of Options
SPACEMERCS-HOWLING_REVENGE.description:
Prevent your next death and heal to {IfUpgraded:show:75%|25%} Hp.
[gold]Purge[/gold] this card from your deck when this effect is used.
SPACEMERCS-HOWLING_REVENGE.title: Howling Revenge
SPACEMERCS-BLISSFUL_IGNORANCE.descriptio:
Gain {Determination:diff()} [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
You can't see your cards next turn.
SPACEMERCS-BLISSFUL_IGNORANCE.title: Blissful Ignorance
SPACEMERCS-COLD_STARE.description:
Apply {SlowedPower:diff()} [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to a random enemy.
Gain {Determination:diff()} [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow].
SPACEMERCS-COLD_STARE.title: Cold Stare
SPACEMERCS-ARCTIC_BLAST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {SlowedPower:diff()} [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-ARCTIC_BLAST.title: Arctic Blast
SPACEMERCS-HONOR_THE_FALLEN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Permanently increase this by {BlockIncrease:diff()} when an enemy dies.
SPACEMERCS-HONOR_THE_FALLEN.title: Honor the Fallen
SPACEMERCS-FRIGID_FORTIFICATION.descript:
Apply {SlowedPower:diff()} [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] to ALL enemies.
Gain [gold]Frost Armor[/gold] this and next turn.
SPACEMERCS-FRIGID_FORTIFICATION.title: Frigid Fortification
SPACEMERCS-HUNKER_DOWN.title: Hunker Down
SPACEMERCS-CANT_DIE_AGAIN.description:
Gain {Determination:diff()} [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow].
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {IfUpgraded:show:|half }your missing Hp.
Costs 0 when under 50% Hp.
SPACEMERCS-CANT_DIE_AGAIN.title: Can't Die Again
SPACEMERCS-HOARFROST_STOMP.description:
Costs 1 [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {SlowedPower:diff()} [color=cyan]Slowed[/color].
Put this back in your hand.
SPACEMERCS-HOARFROST_STOMP.title: Hoarfrost Stomp
SPACEMERCS-SHIVER_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply any debuffs on the enemy to ALL other enemies.
SPACEMERCS-SHIVER_STRIKE.title: Shiver Strike
SPACEMERCS-HOT_AND_COLD.description:
Double the [orange]Scorch[/orange] and [color=cyan]Slowed[/color] on ALL enemies.
Gain 1 [rainbow]Determination[/rainbow] for each enemy [color=orangered]Ignited[/color] or [color=blue][jitter]Frozen[/jitter][/color] this way.
SPACEMERCS-HOT_AND_COLD.title: Hot and Cold
SPACEMERCS-EMPTY_AND_UNMOVING.title: Empty and Unmoving
